ddls:
CREATE TABLE "articles" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each article */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the article */,
  "abstract" TEXT /* Abstract of the article */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date of publication */,
  "journal_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the journal where the article was published */,
  "doi" TEXT /* Digital Object Identifier (DOI) of the article */,
  "num_pages" INTEGER /* Number of pages in the article */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language of the article */,
  "citation_count" INTEGER /* Number of citations the article has received */,
  "create_date" TEXT /* Date the article was created in the system */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date the article was last updated in the system */,
  "fundingAgency" TEXT /* Funding agency of the research */,
  "clinicalTrialId" TEXT /* Clinical trial ID (if applicable) */,
  "studyType" TEXT /* Type of study (e.g., randomized controlled trial, observational study) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_articles_journal_id FOREIGN KEY ("journal_id") REFERENCES journals ("journal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "journals" (
  "journal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each journal */,
  "journal_name" TEXT /* Name of the journal */,
  "issn" TEXT /* International Standard Serial Number (ISSN) of the journal */,
  "publisher" TEXT /* Name of the publisher of the journal */,
  "impact_factor" REAL /* Impact factor of the journal */,
  "create_date" TEXT /* Date the journal was created in the system */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date the journal was last updated in the system */,
  "editor_in_chief" TEXT /* Editor-in-chief of the journal */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the journal */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("journal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "topics" (
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each topic */,
  "topic_name" TEXT /* Name of the topic */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the topic */,
  "create_date" TEXT /* Date the topic was created in the system */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date the topic was last updated in the system */,
  "parent_topic_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent topic (if any) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("topic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "article_topics" (
  "article_topic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each article-topic relationship */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the article */,
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the topic */,
  "score" REAL /* Score indicating the relevance of the topic to the article */,
  "create_date" TEXT /* Date the relationship was created in the system */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date the relationship was last updated in the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_topic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_topics_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_topics_topic_id FOREIGN KEY ("topic_id") REFERENCES topics ("topic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the author */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the author */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the author */,
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the institution the author is affiliated with */,
  "create_date" TEXT /* Date the author was created in the system */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date the author was last updated in the system */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Author's affiliation */,
  "research_interests" TEXT /* Author's research interests */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_authors_institution_id FOREIGN KEY ("institution_id") REFERENCES institutions ("institution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "institutions" (
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each institution */,
  "institution_name" TEXT /* Name of the institution */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the institution */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the institution */,
  "create_date" TEXT /* Date the institution was created in the system */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date the institution was last updated in the system */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department within the institution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("institution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "article_authors" (
  "article_author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each article-author relationship */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the article */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the author */,
  "order" INTEGER /* Order of the author in the article's author list */,
  "create_date" TEXT /* Date the relationship was created in the system */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date the relationship was last updated in the system */,
  "author_role" TEXT /* Role of the author in the article (e.g., primary author, co-author) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_author_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_authors_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_authors_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "geographical_regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each geographical region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the geographical region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the geographical region */,
  "create_date" TEXT /* Date the region was created in the system */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date the region was last updated in the system */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country within the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic category */,
  "demographic_name" TEXT /* Name of the demographic category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the demographic category */,
  "create_date" TEXT /* Date the demographic was created in the system */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date the demographic was last updated in the system */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the demographic (e.g., age, gender, ethnicity) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "article_geographical_demographics" (
  "article_geo_demo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each article-geographical-demographic relationship */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the article */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the geographical region */,
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the demographic category */,
  "create_date" TEXT /* Date the relationship was created in the system */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date the relationship was last updated in the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_geo_demo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_geographical_demographics_demographic_id FOREIGN KEY ("demographic_id") REFERENCES demographics ("demographic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_geographical_demographics_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_geographical_demographics_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES geographical_regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "create_date" TEXT /* Date the user was created in the system */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date the user was last updated in the system */,
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the institution the user is affiliated with */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_institution_id FOREIGN KEY ("institution_id") REFERENCES institutions ("institution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "article_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the article */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the article was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "create_date" TEXT /* Date the access event was created in the system */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date the access event was last updated in the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_access_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clinical_relevance" (
  "clinical_relevance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each clinical relevance entry */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the article */,
  "relevance_score" REAL /* Score indicating the clinical relevance of the article */,
  "create_date" TEXT /* Date the entry was created in the system */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date the entry was last updated in the system */,
  "clinical_trial_id" TEXT /* Clinical trial ID (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("clinical_relevance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_clinical_relevance_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "funding_agencies" (
  "funding_agency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each funding agency */,
  "agency_name" TEXT /* Name of the funding agency */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the funding agency */,
  "create_date" TEXT /* Date the agency was created in the system */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date the agency was last updated in the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("funding_agency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "article_funding" (
  "article_funding_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each article-funding agency relationship */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the article */,
  "funding_agency_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the funding agency */,
  "create_date" TEXT /* Date the relationship was created in the system */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date the relationship was last updated in the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_funding_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_funding_funding_agency_id FOREIGN KEY ("funding_agency_id") REFERENCES funding_agencies ("funding_agency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_funding_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id")
)
